name: tidy3d
description: Tidy3D simulation, API, and documentation guidance for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: AI guidance for Tidy3D simulations, APIs, and docs lookup.
interface.longDescription: Use Tidy3D through your AI coding agent for simulation setup, script review, troubleshooting, geometry import, result analysis, and documentation lookup. Includes tidy3d-mcp and requires uv to launch it via uvx.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Tidy3D simulation.
Review this Tidy3D script for errors.
